questions: Are the patient's symptoms severe and interfering with lifestyle, relationships, and occupational functioning? (Yes/No)
Are the patient's symptoms predominantly physical? (Yes/No)
Are the patient's symptoms predominantly emotional? (Yes/No)
Has the patient received previous therapies without relief? (Yes/No)
Are there any side effects (nausea, vomiting) from bromocriptine that are very severe? (Yes/No)
